E422F1364B6CDEA22A16E59138269135:
Ninjas Mastery includes crafting recipes for <Research>Ninja Scroll</> and <Research>Focus</> items, as well as <Research>Passive Effects</>.

Use your collected Essence to Learn an item, then fulfill requirements to Unlock it!  Unlocked recipes can be crafted at the <Research>TBD</>, which can be discovered by TBD and then built from the <Research>Build Menu</>.

Once Unlocked, <Research>Passive Effects</> will automatically be applied to specified items as long as they meet the rarity requirements of the Effects.
AA39D32E486DEDD0046A0AA074AB9893: Power Surge upgrade: Drains charge more slowly, allowing you to zap through multiple enemies.
82FA074D46676880721DE692CEBE4894: Power Surge upgrade: Overload your powers, dealing damage in a wider radius.
8EDF81314DF21D209BA96B8983E968EA: Razor-sharp throwing stars favored by the Ninja.

57977B3642E1D6CE5A5B24A46DAB9ED5: Tecto-tunneling upgrade: You'll sometimes find patches of rich EARTH, granting items and increasing your shields.
6AE143E54B52A560FD3461B3986739FD: Unlocks ability to harvest Dragon Opal with 3 Pickaxes.
12DC32C340622AD5176D0BB34E894108: Unlocks ability to harvest Steel with 2 Pickaxes.
